title: Practo is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Practo is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Practo invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Practo:
Practo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Practo!
